event: stung on the face and neck by several bees
injected himself with epinephrine auto-injector into right anterolateral thigh
no problems for the rest of the day
presented to ED with right thigh pain
CT scan revealing gas in right thigh anterior compartment
dressings changed wet to dry twice daily
Clostridium perfringens identified from wound cultures
excisional debridement of fascia and muscle
discharged to long-term acute care facility
hyperbaric oxygen therapy continued beyond 10 sessions
